transcript:
Sarah (Rep): Hi Jane, thanks for hopping on this call. I wanted to follow up on the demo we did last week and discuss next steps for getting your team set up.

Jane (Prospect): Hi Sarah, yes absolutely. We were really impressed with the platform. I've already talked to our CTO, Mark, and he's on board.

Sarah: That's great to hear! So I'll send over the contract by end of day Friday. It'll include the enterprise pricing we discussed — $2,400 per month for 50 seats.

Jane: Perfect. I'll need to loop in our legal team to review the contract. I should be able to get that back to you by next Wednesday.

Sarah: Sounds good. In the meantime, I'll also prepare a custom onboarding plan for your team. Do you have a preferred start date in mind?

Jane: We're hoping to kick things off by March 15th. Oh, and I need to get budget approval from our CFO, David Chen. I'll set up a meeting with him this week.

Sarah: Perfect. I can also put together a one-page ROI summary that might help with the budget conversation. I'll have that to you by tomorrow.

Jane: That would be really helpful, thank you. Can you send it to jane.smith@acmecorp.com?

Sarah: Absolutely. One more thing — I'll schedule a technical walkthrough with your CTO Mark for next week. Would Tuesday or Thursday work better?

Jane: Thursday would be ideal. Mark is usually free after 2 PM Eastern.

Sarah: Great, I'll send the calendar invite for Thursday at 2:30 PM Eastern. Is there anything else you need from our side?

Jane: Actually, yes. Can you send over some case studies from companies similar to ours? Specifically in the fintech space.

Sarah: Of course. I'll compile those and include them with the ROI summary tomorrow. We have some great results from two fintech clients.

Jane: Wonderful. I think that covers everything. I'll also make sure to have our IT team review the security documentation you sent over.

Sarah: Perfect. So just to recap — I'll send the contract by Friday, the ROI summary and case studies by tomorrow, and schedule the technical walkthrough with Mark for Thursday at 2:30 PM. And you'll get legal review started and set up the CFO meeting.

Jane: That's right. Thanks Sarah, talk to you soon!

Sarah: Thanks Jane, looking forward to it!
